VUB–Leeds Algebra School (2026)

8–12 June 2026 • Brussels, Belgium

Organised within the topYB International Joint Research Group (IJRG).

TopYB | Overview | Registration | Poster session | Programme | Location & Travel | Organisers

Poster Session

The summer school will include a poster session, giving participants the opportunity to present their work and discuss it with other attendees in an informal setting.

To present a poster, please send the title and a short abstract of your poster by email to the organisers.

Best Poster Prize

A small prize will be awarded for the best poster.


Best poster prize supported by Open Mathematics

Questions?

Contact: Leandro Vendramin (VUB) • Ilaria Colazzo (Leeds)

Sponsors

Vrije Universiteit Brussel (VUB) • University of Leeds • De Gruyter Brill
